name: Fake Desktop / Automation Inversion
description: Manage four overlapping windows while three transformed remote-cursor mappings govern two ordered seal transfers and final arming.
natural_language: Use the remote cursor: expose the vault, transfer both requested seals in order across three remaps, then arm manual control.

metadata.variant_count_kind: mapping triple, ordered seal pair, and seeded layout combinations
metadata.notes: A real virtual-coordinate desktop maps physical pointer coordinates into a visible remote cursor, replays z-order and two independent window moves, and changes mapping at each of two ordered seal-transfer boundaries before final arming.
